title: A Haunting on Dice Road: The Hell House
original_title: A Haunting on Dice Road: The Hell House
overview: An entire year of investigation, multiple law enforcement agencies, hundreds of police reports, months of undercover surveillance, thousands of man hours, numerous polygraphs, a string of mysterious fires, a series of unexplained explosions, life threatening injuries, and one family’s worst fears realized.
